BLOCK_CACHE
Doris-inspired Block Cache for decoded RecordBatches. Bypasses Parquet decoding/decompression for frequently accessed blocks.

HNSW_CACHE
HNSW_IVF_CACHE
Cache for HNSW-IVF hybrid indexes These are more memory-efficient than plain HNSW since they only load needed clusters
